attacks.scenario: 還原後 panel 不存在時 toggle/重加 throw 破壞版面
attacks.failSafeTest: togglePanel 對缺 panel 不 throw 且重加；連續 toggle 不 throw

attacks.scenario: 持久化 envelope round-trip 遺失 UI 狀態/與 legacy 純樹不相容
attacks.failSafeTest: serialize→parse→deserialize round-trip 還原同 ui；相容 legacy 純 dockview 樹

attacks.scenario: 最大化狀態無法可逆/還原失敗 brick
attacks.failSafeTest: toggleTerminalMaximize 用原生 maximize/exitMaximize；還原失敗退回非最大化保留全 panel

attacks.scenario: 損毀/惡意 layout JSON(NaN 尺寸/巨量 panel/深巢狀) → 還原崩潰或 OOM
attacks.failSafeTest: validateLayout 拒 NaN/負尺寸/panel>50/深度>8/非物件 → 回 null 走預設不 brick

attacks.scenario: 去抖視窗內關閉 → 最新版面遺失
